info.description: API for the Kochappi fitness platform.
info.title: Kochappi API

post.description: Sends a password reset OTP code to the user's email
Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's ID and role

post.description: Generates a new pair of access and refresh tokens using a valid refresh token
Creates a new user account and returns authentication tokens
Resets the user's password using the OTP code received via email

get.description: Returns a list of all customers

post.description: Creates a new customer linked to an existing user with the client role

get.description: Returns a single customer by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing customer's name and birthdate

delete.description: Deletes a customer record (does not delete the associated user)

get.description: Returns all progress logs for a given customer
get.summary: List progress logs for a customer

post.description: Creates a new progress log for a customer with check date and weight

get.description: Returns a single progress log with its associated photos
get.summary: Get a progress log with photos

delete.description: Deletes a progress log and all its associated photos and files

post.description: Uploads a photo for a progress log (multipart form: file + pictureType)

delete.description: Deletes a single photo from a progress log

get.description: Returns a list of all exercises

post.description: Creates a new exercise and returns it

get.description: Returns a single exercise by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing exercise by its ID

delete.description: Deletes an exercise by its ID

get.description: Returns a list of routines, optionally filtered by customer ID

post.description: Creates a new routine, optionally including exercise details

get.description: Returns a routine with all its details

put.description: Updates the name of a routine

post.description: Activates a routine and creates a new period
Deactivates a routine and closes the ongoing period
Adds a new exercise detail to an existing routine
post.summary: Add a detail to a routine

delete.description: Removes a specific detail from a routine
delete.summary: Remove a detail from a routine

get.description: Returns all periods for a routine
Returns a list of all templates (without details)

post.description: Creates a new template, optionally including exercise details

get.description: Returns a template with all its details

put.description: Updates the name and description of a template (does not affect details)

delete.description: Deletes a template. Associated details are cascade-deleted and routines referencing this template will have template_id set to NULL

post.description: Adds a new exercise detail to an existing template
post.summary: Add a detail to a template

delete.description: Removes a specific detail from a template
delete.summary: Remove a detail from a template

get.description: Returns a list of users, optionally filtered by role

post.description: Creates a new user with the specified role

get.description: Returns a single user by their ID

patch.description: Updates the email address of a user, checking for uniqueness

get.description: Returns workout sessions for a routine, optionally filtered by status or date range

parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, in_progress, completed, skipped)
parameters.name: status

post.description: Manually triggers daily session generation for all active routines

get.description: Returns a workout session with its exercise logs
get.summary: Get a workout session by ID

post.description: Creates an exercise log for an in_progress workout session

patch.description: Transitions a workout session to a new status (in_progress, completed, skipped)

BearerAuth.description: Enter your bearer token in the format: Bearer {token}
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
